series_metadata.series_description: Meeting minutes, agendas, project documents and final reports of the School Funding Advisory Council (SFAC) with respect to the recommendations of Ohio's evidence-based school funding system. Subcommittees established to foster collaboration and reported its findings and recommendations to the council.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years then destroy. Retain meeting minutes and final reports published for 3 years then review by State Archives prior to disposition ; Paper: Retain for 3 years then destroy. Retain meeting minutes and final reports published for 3 years then review by State Archives prior to disposition, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
